response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software and infrastructure engineering, with a strong background in full-stack development, AI-agent infrastructure, and cloud technologies. However, his resume lacks explicit AI-focused leadership, entrepreneurial experience within larger organizations, or recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products/platforms built with AI. His recent roles at Naver and Tencent show relevant technical depth but may not fully align with the AI strategy and leadership expectations at the director level.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and frameworks
Leadership in open-source projects and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators, Fluent-Asserts)
Experience with cloud technologies (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and real-time systems (low-latency apps, Dlang)
concerns: Limited explicit AI strategy or leadership experience in current roles
No clear entrepreneurial or startup experience within larger organizations
No advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) in AI-related fields, though compensated by practical experience

key_factors.factor: AI/Cloud expertise and strategic product development
